title: Getting Started with CIPP
description: Learn the basics of navigating CIPP and managing your tenants.

popover.title: Welcome to CIPP! 👋
popover.description: This quick tour will show you the key features of the CIPP dashboard. Let's get started!

popover.title: Tenant Selector
popover.description: Use the tenant selector to switch between your managed tenants. You can search by name or select 'All Tenants' for a global view.

popover.title: Navigation Menu
popover.description: The sidebar gives you access to all CIPP modules — Identity, Endpoint, Security, Email, Teams & SharePoint, and more.

popover.title: Quick Actions
popover.description: Use the help button in the bottom-right corner to report bugs, request features, join Discord, or access the documentation.

popover.title: You're all set! 🎉
popover.description: You now know the basics. Explore the sidebar to discover all the tools CIPP offers. You can replay this tour anytime from the Tutorials menu.
